overview.endpointHelper: Use this URL in client connection settings.
overview.roleHelper: Admins can manage users and cross-user sharing.

milestoneCalendars.title: Milestone Calendars
milestoneCalendars.syncDescription: When enabled, Davvy keeps generated milestone calendar events in sync with contact dates.
milestoneCalendars.syncDescriptionExtra: Turning off sync does not delete calendars unless you choose Delete.
milestoneCalendars.disablePrompt:
Turn off {{label}} milestone sync for {{name}}?

Press OK to delete the generated calendar.
Press Cancel to keep the calendar and only stop sync.

sharing.title: Share Your Resources
sharing.subtitle: Grant read-only, editor, or admin access for resources you own and marked as sharable. Admin access includes collection delete rights.

appleCompat.title: Apple Contacts Compatibility
appleCompat.subtitle: Off by default. Mirror selected address books into your main address book for better macOS Contacts visibility.
appleCompat.missingTarget: No default Contacts address book found for your account.
appleCompat.noSources: No eligible owned/shared address books available.

privateWorkingSet.title: Private Working Set
privateWorkingSet.subtitle: Create per-user private copies of shared contacts so local edits stay private unless you explicitly promote them.
privateWorkingSet.hideShared: Hide selected shared source books from DAV discovery
privateWorkingSet.noSources: No eligible shared address books available.

notices.privateWorkingSetPulled: Private working set pulled from shared sources.
notices.privateWorkingSetForcePulled: Private working set force-pulled from shared sources.
notices.privateWorkingSetPromoted: Private card promoted to shared source.
